evals.name: NSCLC EGFR patient trial matching
evals.prompt: 我爸爸刚确诊肺腺癌四期，EGFR突变，用过奥希替尼，现在耐药了。想找临床试验。
evals.expected_output: Output mentions trial IDs (NCT or ChiCTR), eligibility assessment, hospital locations, and contact info.
assertions: Output mentions at least one clinical trial ID

evals.name: CRC KRAS G12C patient trial matching
evals.prompt: 结肠癌，KRAS G12C突变，二线治疗后进展，想找临床试验
evals.expected_output: Output identifies KRAS G12C specific trials with eligibility criteria.
assertions: Output mentions KRAS G12C specific trial

evals.name: ChiCTR trial search in Chinese
evals.prompt: 我想找ChiCTR注册的临床试验，胰腺癌，BRCA突变
evals.expected_output: Output returns ChiCTR registration number and Chinese hospital info.
assertions: Output mentions Chinese hospital or institution
